title: COOLING SHELTER LOCATOR - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY HELP FOR WHEN IT'S HOT WEBSITE COOLING SHELTER LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on places to keep cool, extended library hours for weather events and, when activated for extreme heat, information on hours and locations of cooling centers in the county. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Cooling centers operate during heat advisories. Locations are open either throughout the summer season or when temperature thresholds are met. Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Disaster Related Drinking Water Extreme Heat Cooling Centers Extreme Heat Swimming Facilities Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - HOT WEATHER INFORMATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
